publishedAbstract: - When mounting a volume in OpenShift with OCS running in external mode there are problems access the files: ~~~ ls: cannot access 'registry': Permission denied total 4 drwxr-xr-x. 2 root root 6 Apr 23 2020 opt dr-xr-xr-x. 1301 root root 0 Jan 10 10:46 proc d??????????????? registry dr-xr-x---. 1 root root 23 Oct 26 13:03 root ~~~
publishedTitle: Permission denied while using Persistent Volumes with OCS in external mode
